Package de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractGenericRemover  
    GenericRemover  
    GenericResolutionTransformation
    This is the base class to all transformations used in the generics removal process.
    Main
    That's the entry point when the transformation is to be applied outside from the KeY-tool.
    PreviewGenericRemover  
    ResolveFieldReference  
    ResolveGenerics
    A recoder transformation that removes all traces of Java5 generics from a file.
    ResolveMemberReference  
    ResolveTypeReference
    Handle a type reference in the generic deletion process.
    SingleLineCommentRepairer
    This class has been used to repair a bug in recoder.
    TestComment
    This class has been used to point out a bug in recoder.
